headline: Cooper Companies (COO) Is Up 10.0% After Record Sales, Litigation Hit and Buyback Completion - What's Changed
summary: Earlier this week, The Cooper Companies reported second-quarter 2026 results showing record sales of US$1,081.5 million but a net loss of US$77.9 million, largely due to a US$271.6 million litigation charge tied to a 2023 CooperSurgical product recall. The company paired this with updated full-year 2026 revenue guidance of about US$4.29–US$4.32 billion, confirmation of stronger non‑GAAP earnings, and completion of a long-running share repurchase program totaling over US$1.14 billion,...
